title: RDK Large Crystal Clear Glass Fruit Bowl, Modern Art Shallow Dish Pudding Trifle Dessert Serving Bowl Ideal Decorative Bowls, Salad and Potpourri, 29cm x 9cm
features: PREMIUM CRYSTAL: Large crystal clear glass bowl crafted with intricate star pattern design and decorative scalloped edges for elegant presentation
VERSATILE USE: Shallow dish serving bowl perfect for fruits, salads, desserts, trifles, puddings and decorative displays like potpourri
GENEROUS SIZE: Measures 29 centimetres in diameter, providing ample capacity for serving or displaying food and decorative items. 9cm Deep.
ELEGANT DESIGN: Modern artistic pattern combines classic crystal detailing with contemporary styling for a timeless look
PRACTICAL SERVING: Deep bowl design with stable base makes it ideal for both everyday use and special occasions
description: Elevate your dining and entertaining experience with this exquisite 29-centimetre crystal glass serving bowl by RDK. The shallow dish design features an intricate star-pattern etching that creates a stunning visual display, making it as decorative as it is functional. Perfect for serving fruits, salads, puddings, trifles, and other delectable treats, this versatile bowl adds a touch of sophistication to any table setting. The scalloped edges and detailed crystal-cut pattern reflect light beautifully, creating an elegant centrepiece for your dining table or buffet. The generous size and substantial 9cm depth make it ideal for large gatherings or family meals. This multi-purpose bowl can also serve as a decorative accent piece when filled with potpourri or seasonal displays. Crafted from high-quality clear glass, it maintains its brilliance while being practical for everyday use. Whether you're hosting a formal dinner party or serving a casual family meal, this RDK crystal glass bowl combines classic design with modern functionality.
